ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the player belongs to (e.g., NBA) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'2') */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's primary position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_abv" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name (e.g., SEA) */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team (e.g., Seattle Supersonics) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., NBA) */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Home arena name */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "coach_start_date" TEXT /* Date the current coach started */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON string containing links to social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_position_history" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the player played in that position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "position_id", "season")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "point_differential" INTEGER /* Point differential */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  "division_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins within the division */,
  "division_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses within the division */,
  "conference_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins within the conference */,
  "conference_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses within the conference */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the player
